issue.title: Make abcvlib buildable on JitPack without GitHub credentials

comment.body: Closing as addressed by the APKDistribution milestone work collected in [PR #203](https://github.com/tekkura/sr-android/pull/203). The milestone branch removes the unconditional GitHub credential gate for normal public builds, replaces the authenticated dependency path with a public JitPack-compatible one, and checks in JitPack-specific project configuration.
